mapper.select: SELECT c.review_no, c.plan_no, c.user_no, c.review_content, c.review_rating AS rating, NVL(u.user_nickname, u.user_name) AS created_by, CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS created_at FROM Community c LEFT JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = c.user_no WHERE c.plan_no = #{planNo} AND c.review_content IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.review_no DESC
